label: Audio wiring + record_out moviefileoutTOP — close-out
context: Drop in canonical base_audio_v001.tox, bind ctrl_master.par.Energy to the smooth_out energy channel, wire moviefileoutTOP at the end of the chain for h264+audio export.

operations.notes: Canonical 8-channel WOBAR audio analysis tox: sub_bass, bass, mid, high, energy, sub_pressure, growl, transient. audio_in is raw 44100Hz stereo, smooth_out is lagged 60Hz timeslice analysis.
Bind ctrl_master.Energy directly to audio analysis. Drives sa1.Timescale via the existing audio expression on the SA module.

Per gotcha tracker: moviefileoutTOP audiochop MUST be raw audio_in (44100Hz), NOT smooth_out (60Hz timeslice analysis chain). Idle viewport shows 128×128 placeholder; actual recording writes at outputresolution (720×1280) when par.record=True is pulsed.

verified: audio_master 8 channels live; ctrl_master.Energy reads ~0.6 with audio playing
record_out wired to null_mirror_out via input0top
to_render: Set audio_master/audio_in.par.file to the mp3/wav for the song. Set audio_in.par.cuepulse to seek to start. Toggle record_out.par.record to True. Let song play through. Toggle record_out.par.record to False when complete. Output mp4 lands at the configured file path.
